bottom_line: Add stronger QV gate retry/escalation rules so repeated infrastructure-style failures stop looping and switch to diagnosis earlier.
coverage_notes: DB telemetry available (db-identity check passed). Read all small logs fully; for larger gate logs (~400-600KB: S11/S12), used grep for failures plus tail sections for terminal summaries and fix-cycle outcomes.

findings.title: QV gates oscillated between fail/pass across repeated reruns
findings.recommendation: Add explicit retry caps and auto-escalation guidance in gate-fix flow when the same gate repeats with similar failure signatures.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/I-00113_S10_run1.log:5 — 'Failed I-00113 step S10: assertions failed: exit=2'
ai-dev/logs/I-00113_S13_run1.log:25 — 'Failed I-00113 step S13: diff-coverage failed: exit=2'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add retry-cap and infra-escalation rules to QV gate-fix guidance to prevent repeated fail/pass thrash; analyzed in I-00113 (see ai-dev/work/I-00113/reports/I-00113_self_assess_report.md). Target file: skills/iw-fix-gates/SKILL.md. Effort: M.

findings.title: Unit-test collection hard-fails when optional anthropic dependency is absent
findings.recommendation: Guard optional-SDK tests consistently (or ensure dependency is present in default test env) so test collection cannot fail early.
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Harden optional-provider test handling so make test-unit does not fail collection when anthropic is missing; analyzed in I-00113 (see ai-dev/work/I-00113/reports/I-00113_self_assess_report.md). Target file: tests/unit/test_llm_judge_script.py. Effort: S.

findings.title: Integration gate repeatedly failed on test DB connection refusal
findings.recommendation: Refactor dashboard test fixtures so middleware and route handlers bind to the same live testcontainer engine/port lifecycle.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/I-00113_S12_run1.log:3380 — 'connection to server at "127.0.0.1", port 50444 failed: Connection refused'
ai-dev/logs/I-00113_S12_run6.log:3380 — 'connection to server at "127.0.0.1", port 50444 failed: Connection refused'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Investigate and fix dashboard integration-test DB binding flake causing repeated Connection refused failures in make test-integration; analyzed in I-00113 (see ai-dev/work/I-00113/reports/I-00113_self_assess_report.md). Target files: tests/dashboard/test_route_contract_sweep.py and related fixtures. Effort: M.
